title: Federal Aviation Administration: Key provisions in the 2024 reauthorization act and related GAO work
abstractNote: Testimony before the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure. FAA Reauthorization Act of 2024 (signed May 16, 2024) authorizes FAA through FY2028. Expands aviation maintenance career grant programs, establishes new manufacturing workforce program. Authorizes $20M each for two existing aviation maintenance workforce development grant programs plus $20M for a third (manufacturing), FY24-FY28. Programs redesignated as CAREER beginning 2027. Directs FAA to revise mechanic certification regs for military experience applicants. FAA acknowledges AMT school curriculum and testing standards are outdated. GAO has 50 open recommendations to FAA from reports since 2020.
